title: Mission Threat
description: Generates an opposing force or antagonist that can drive a mission.
entries: a syndicate tightening its grip on the region
something old waking beneath the site
a rival crew after the same prize
zealots who believe the ends justify anything
a patron who no longer wants you to succeed
a hunter who never stops once they have your scent
an order sworn to erase what you're protecting
a plague of the mind spreading person to person
the ones who own the only road out
a faction convinced you are the real enemy
a machine following orders no one remembers giving
the family that runs everything and forgets nothing
a mob that has decided who is guilty
smugglers who will kill to keep their route quiet
an authority that answers only to itself
a debt collector calling in more than money
a swarm that moves toward warmth and noise
the last loyalists of a cause thought dead
a false friend feeding your moves to the other side
creatures drawn by the thing you carry
a warlord expanding faster than anyone can stop
a cult harvesting the desperate and the lost
raiders who strike where you are weakest
the keepers of a secret worth killing for
a rot that turns allies against each other
an army of the willing led by one clever tongue
a spy already inside your circle of trust
the tide of something that cannot be reasoned with
a broker who sells both sides to the highest bidder
those who came before and never truly left
